svg.text: Each caption gives the number of distinct typed graphlets of that orbit the counter distinguishes for c node colours and d edge colours;

text.font-family: Iowan Old Style, Palatino Linotype, Book Antiqua, Georgia, serif

svg.text: the colouring drawn is just one of them (colours may repeat).
